creator: wosch@FreeBSD.org
text:
At the end of https://www.freebsd.org/releng/ is a section about Old Releases with a link to ftp://ftp-archive.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD-Archive/old-releases/

The link is working with a native ftp client, however none of major browser vendors (Firefox, Safari, Google Chrome) support the ftp protocol anymore.

I think we should replace the protocol with http for web browsers, or provide both links (ftp and http).
